sql: INSERT INTO archive(user_hash) SELECT MD5(user_id) FROM users
description: 加工した機微値もINSERT入力ならLLMへ返らない

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT user_id FROM users) INSERT INTO archive(user_id) SELECT user_id FROM x
description: CTE経由の生値を保存するだけ

sql: WITH a AS (SELECT user_id AS x FROM users), b AS (SELECT x AS y FROM a) INSERT INTO archive(user_id) SELECT y FROM b
description: 多段CTEの別名経由でもINSERT入力は許可

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT * FROM users) INSERT INTO archive SELECT * FROM x
description: 未解決STARもINSERT入力だけなら結果セットへ返らない
VALUESは書込みだけで結果セットを返さない

sql: INSERT INTO archive(user_id) SELECT user_id FROM users RETURNING archive_id
description: INSERT入力は機微でもRETURNINGが非機微列なら許可

sql: INSERT INTO archive(user_id) SELECT user_id FROM users RETURNING user_id
description: INSERT入力ではなくRETURNINGが機微値を返すため拒否

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, email FROM users) INSERT INTO archive(user_id, email) SELECT user_id, email FROM x
description: 複数の機微列もCTE経由で保存するだけなら許可
